source.venue: Journal of Rail Transport Planning & Management

formulas.label: fd11
formulas.latex: P_{i j k} = \frac{e x p \left(- \theta \overset{\sim}{t}_{i j k}\right)}{\sum_{k \in R_{i j}} e x p \left(- \theta \overset{\sim}{t}_{i j k}\right)}

formulas.label: fd12
formulas.latex: \overset{\sim}{t}_{i j k} = \beta^{w} \cdot t_{s_{k , 1}}^{w} + \sum_{v = 1}^{\left|k\right| - 1} \beta^{i n} \cdot t_{s_{k , v} , s_{k , v + 1}}^{i n} + \sum_{q = 2}^{\left|k\right| - 1} \beta^{t r - t i m e} \cdot t_{k , q}^{t r} + \beta^{t r} \cdot N^{t r} + \beta^{r e} \cdot N^{r e}

formulas.label: fd13
formulas.latex: f_{i j k} = d_{i j} \cdot P_{i j k}

formulas.label: fd14
formulas.latex: t_{i j k} = t_{s_{k , 1}}^{w} + \sum_{v = 1}^{\left|k\right| - 1} t_{s_{k , v} , s_{k , v + 1}}^{i n} + \sum_{q = 2}^{\left|k\right| - 1} t_{k , q}^{t r}
